feature_note: venue_elevation replaced by binary indicator: 1 if stadium altitude > 500m, 0 otherwise
model: KDE_TS(bw=300, C2=2.0, pw=0.2) * 0.34 + SVC(C=5.0, kernel='rbf', gamma='scale') * 0.66
note: Altitude as binary indicator (>500m) dramatically outperforms continuous elevation. W3C-36 also tested log(elevation+1), rest×elev interaction, separate rest_days_home/away, travel_km — all worse than indicator.
